description: Phase 9 Part 1: Add core data models, service logic, and tests for QuantMail (email CRUD, thread management, labels, search, undo-send flow), QuantChat (conversations, messages, presence, typing indicators, reactions), and QuantDocs (document CRUD, version history, comments, collaboration presence, export). These apps already have route files and some services. This feature fills in missing core service methods to meet launch gates. Focus on the service layer with comprehensive tests.
steps: In apps/quantmail/backend/services/email.service.ts: ensure methods exist for sendEmail, getInbox, getThread, archiveEmail, trashEmail, starEmail, searchEmails, getLabels, applyLabel. If missing, add them following the DocService pattern (constructor takes Prisma, methods return typed results).
In apps/quantmail/backend/services/thread.service.ts: ensure getThread, listThreads, muteThread, snoozeThread exist with proper typing.
In apps/quantchat/backend/services/conversation.service.ts: ensure createConversation, getConversations, getConversation, addParticipant, removeParticipant, markRead exist.
In apps/quantchat/backend/services/message.service.ts: ensure sendMessage, getMessages, editMessage, deleteMessage, reactToMessage, pinMessage, searchMessages exist.
In apps/quantchat/backend/services/typing.service.ts: ensure startTyping, stopTyping, getTypingUsers exist (using in-memory Map or Redis interface).
In apps/quantdocs/backend/services/doc.service.ts: verify createDoc, getDoc, updateDoc, deleteDoc, listDocs, getVersionHistory, restoreVersion exist and are complete.
In apps/quantdocs/backend/services/comment.service.ts: verify addComment, getComments, resolveComment, replyToComment, deleteComment exist.
In apps/quantdocs/backend/services/presence.service.ts: verify joinDocument, leaveDocument, getActiveCollaborators, updateCursor exist.
Add missing tests in apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/email.service.test.ts and thread.service.test.ts (if not already present or incomplete).
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint to verify all gates pass
acceptance_criteria: QuantMail email.service has send, inbox, thread, archive, trash, star, search, labels methods with tests
QuantChat conversation and message services support full CRUD + reactions + presence with tests
QuantDocs doc/comment/presence services are complete with tests
